name: Credit Supreme - Credit Repair Miami - Fix Credit Fast Miami FL
description_short: Veteran-owned Miami credit repair firm with tiered plans from $49.99/mo, same-day dispute filing, dedicated credit coaches, and a 90-day money-back guarantee.
description_long:
Credit Supreme LLC (also doing business as One Solution Credit) is a veteran-owned credit repair company headquartered in Doral, Florida, within the Miami metro area. Founded in 2019 and managed by Esther Cabado, the firm serves clients nationwide while maintaining a strong local presence in South Florida. The team claims 15 or more years of combined credit industry experience, and with over 1,100 Google reviews averaging 4.8 stars, the company has built a notably strong reputation for a firm of its age and size.

Credit Supreme operates on a month-to-month subscription model with three individual plans — Standard at $49.99 per month, Premier at $99.99, and Elite at $119.99 — plus couples plans priced lower per person. A one-time setup fee applies to each tier. After enrollment, dispute letters are filed within 24 hours, targeting all major negative item types through 30-day cycles: late payments, collections, charge-offs, medical debt, bankruptcies, repossessions, student loans, hard inquiries, child support, and public records. Each client is assigned a dedicated credit coach and gains access to a 24/7 online portal for tracking progress, communicating with the team, and uploading supporting documents.

Unlike competitors that cap dispute volume per cycle, Credit Supreme claims to target all eligible negative items simultaneously from the first round. A 90-day money-back guarantee promises a full refund of monthly fees if no item deletions occur by the third billing cycle. Military discounts are available for veterans and active-duty service members, consistent with the firm's veteran-owned positioning. No long-term contracts are required — clients can cancel at any time by text or email. The company reports an 87% overall removal rate, and mortgage preparation and business credit services are also available through a separate division.

Customer reviews are broadly positive, with recurring praise for fast dispute filing, responsive coaches, and credit score improvements within two to four months. The primary concern is that the 90-day refund guarantee has documented friction in practice — BBB complaints describe difficulty obtaining promised refunds, and at least one customer was referred to a collections agency after disputing charges. The company holds an A+ BBB rating but is not BBB accredited. The pricing tier structure is also opaque: all plans cover identical dispute categories with no clear public explanation of what distinguishes Standard from Elite. Prospective clients should ask the company directly what additional value higher-cost tiers provide before committing to a more expensive plan.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: 90-day money-back guarantee: if no item deletions occur by the third billing cycle, monthly fees are refunded. Note: multiple BBB complaints document difficulty obtaining this refund in practice; at least one customer was referred to collections after disputing charges.

pros: 4.8/5 Google rating from over 1,100 reviews — exceptional volume of social proof
Disputes all eligible negative items simultaneously from day one, not capped per cycle
Dispute letters filed within 24 hours of enrollment
Veteran-owned with military and veteran discounts available

Dedicated credit coach assigned to every client
Mortgage preparation and business credit services available alongside personal plans
cons: 90-day money-back guarantee has documented friction — BBB complaints cite refund denials and at least one referral to collections after a billing dispute
Tier pricing structure is opaque — Standard, Premier, and Elite cover identical dispute categories with no publicly stated differentiation
Not BBB accredited despite holding an A+ rating and being eligible
No mobile app for account management

best_for: South Florida residents who want a local, hands-on credit repair team
Veterans and active-duty military seeking a veteran-owned firm with applicable discounts
Couples repairing credit together who benefit from the discounted per-person couples pricing
Homebuyers who need credit repair combined with mortgage preparation support
diagnosis: Credit Supreme is a well-reviewed option for Miami-area consumers and veterans who want fast dispute initiation, a dedicated coach, and flexible month-to-month terms with no contracts. The main caveat is that the 90-day money-back guarantee is not reliably honored in practice — clients who view it as a financial safety net should be aware it has generated documented BBB complaints. The pricing tier structure also warrants a direct conversation before upgrading beyond the Standard plan, as the company does not publicly explain what additional value the higher tiers provide.
services: Credit dispute filing for all major negative item types
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
